title: delphinium gautieri
intro: Delphinium gautieri, also known as the alpine delphinium, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium gautieri include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in herbal teas and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
